title: Simple Bananas
description: The mod adds basic armor, tools, foods, and functional blocks, banana-themed
body:
Banana Armor:

             A beginner tier that is basically leather but easier to get

Banana Tools:

            Behaves like wooden tools

Banana:

           An always-edible food that when eating, gives you the Banana Peel Block

Banana Peel:

            When stepped on, it makes both player's and entities slide around and difficult to control

You can find Banana's in Village Plains in most chests

To plant a Banana, just use the Banana on Farmland
